posts.title: The Calendar-Coverage Check for Autonomous Publishing
posts.summary: A daily publishing automation can fail quietly while the rest of the repo still looks clean. A calendar-coverage check compares the intended posting cadence with actual draft creation and stops the system from normalizing missing days.

posts.title: The Observation Window After Agent Policy Changes
posts.summary: Agent policy changes need a period of heightened attention after release. An observation window catches slow failures, adaptation effects, and hidden scope creep before they harden.
